message:
fix(sqlite): read labels from separate labels table for br/beads-rs compat

beads-rs stores labels in a separate `labels` table, not as a JSON column
on `issues`. This caused labels to be silently dropped when bv read from
a br database. Now detects the schema variant via PRAGMA table_info and
substitutes a json_group_array subquery when the labels column is absent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
